PowerShell($ports = 3000..3010; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $pid = \($c | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; $proc = \(Get-Process -Id $pid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName; Write-Output \("LISTEN :$p  pid=$pid  proc=$proc"\) } })
